{{Quote|Alkhara died, but recently a group of people who were ousted from their homes by Sand People got together and reformed themselves into a group called Alkhara's bandits. Which would be fine if they'd just stick to fighting the Sand People.|[[Reelo Baruk]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:JPRB" />}}
The '''Alkhara Bandits''', also referred to as the '''Alkharans''', were a band of criminals based on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==History==
[[File:AlkharaBandit.jpg|125px|thumb|An Alkhara Bandit]]
{{Quote|They have to keep supplied so they hit some of the outlying farms and merchants and such. Trouble is those people pay Jabba for protection. Jabba, in his infinite capacity for selfless behavior is now actually going to honor those contracts. You're going to make sure the Alkharans stop attacking the merchants|Reelo Baruk, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:JPRB" />}}
The Alkhara Bandits were formed after the death of their ideological leader, [[Alkhara/Legends|Alkhara]],<ref name="CDAG" /> sometime after [[516 BBY]].<ref name="Dates">''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]'' places Alkhara's arrival on Tatooine at [[550 BBY]], and ''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]'' establishes that he spent at least 34 years on the world.</ref> Decades later, the group of thieves re-emerged under the leadership of several Tatooine residents who had been chased out of their homes by [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]].<ref name="CDAG" />

The Alkhara Bandits were at constant war with the Tusken Raiders, but they would also attack villages and [[Moisture farm/Legends|moisture farms]] in order to pillage for supplies.<ref name="SWG:JPRB" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] grew increasingly concerned about the expansion of the Alkhara Bandits. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Zaster]] of the [[Imperial Second Division]] sent an official notice to all Imperial personnel on Tatooine in order to reinforce patrols in the concerned areas.<ref name="SWG:SC">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|SECURE COMMUNICATION}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Alkharan bandits raided people who were theoretically under the protection of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. The [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] did not appreciate and wanted to teach the Bandits a lesson. [[Reelo Baruk]] then hired a spacer to kill ten Alkharan bandits.<ref name="SWG:JPRB" />
